Author: AemiliusXIV
Name: Orchestrion
Punchline: BGM replacement with local audio support
Description:
Play and replace FFXIV background music. Supports local MP3/WAV files from your PC alongside all in-game tracks, with fade transitions and volume sync.

Originally by perchbird & Meli: https://github.com/perchbirdd/OrchestrionPlugin
Changelog: Added local audio library — import MP3/WAV files from your PC and use them as BGM replacements, with per-song display IDs, fade transitions, and bulk import support.
